title: Standing model review — current seat model bindings, verified against the connector
note: The lifecycle's model-currency record: per-seat alias -> current mapped id, machine-probed against connectors/ai-peer-mcp/server.mjs#mapModelName by verify-contracts (the LATEST file in MODEL-REVIEWS/ is auto-probed, so this documentation cannot silently lag the mapper). Model ids are env-resolved per run with NO silent defaults — a seat with no model fails closed ('Missing <seat> model'). Which model ACTUALLY answered any run is proven by per-seat provenance, not by this record.

effort_gates.claude: Fable: effort low|medium|high|xhigh|max (seat default max); Opus 4.7-4.8 as requested; Opus 4.6 clamps xhigh->high; Opus 4.5 clamps xhigh/max->high
effort_gates.codex: reasoning_effort gated to gpt-5.6*; default xhigh; max clamps to xhigh
effort_gates.grok: reasoning_effort gated to grok-4.5; caps at high
effort_gates.gemini: thinkingLevel gated to gemini-3*; default high

provenance_anchors.grok: grok-4.3 in frozen 2026-06/07 evidence; grok-4.5 is the current alias default — noted, not contradictory (evidence records the id at its moment)

stale_docs_fixed_this_review: connectors/ai-peer-mcp/README.md: added missing gemini_ask (tool list, GEMINI_API_KEY/GEMINI_MODEL requirements, env + config examples, args example); fixed 'codex -> gpt-4o' to gpt-5.6-sol; five->six tools; vault-era absolute paths made repo-relative
frozen_mentions_untouched: docs/runs/** (all), docs/STATUS.md, docs/history/sdd-progress.md, docs/ENGINE-APPLY.md — historical ids (gpt-4o-2024-08-06, grok-4.3, claude-sonnet-4-6) are correct-for-their-moment provenance
test fixtures (test-standing, test-council-orchestrator, test-provenance, test-council) use old ids as mocks — they test mechanics, not currency; left as-is
next_review: at the next slice pre-review, or when a provider ships a model generation worth a seat change (a reviewed edit to build-gate/seats.json)
